# EdgeReco

> EdgeReco is an open-source, browser-first product recommendation engine. After a
> one-time sync of a small signed catalog bundle, product search, ranking, and
> recommendations run entirely on the shopper's device — with no per-query backend
> ranking call. "Nimbus" is a fictional demo store used to showcase EdgeReco.

## Canonical links

- Live demo: https://edge-reco.com/
- Source (GitHub): https://github.com/hseshadr/edge-reco
- Maintainer: https://github.com/hseshadr
- Substrate (EdgeProc): https://github.com/hseshadr/edge-proc
- EdgeProc name disambiguation: https://edge-reco.com/edgeproc
- FAQ: https://edge-reco.com/faq

## Project facts

- Name: EdgeReco
- Also written as: Edge-Reco, edge-reco
- Category: open-source browser-first product recommendation engine
- Runtime: web browser / local-first execution
- Languages: TypeScript (browser engine), Python (catalog and bundle tooling)
- Core techniques: signed, content-addressed catalog bundles verified fail-closed
  (Ed25519 signature over an sha256 content-addressed manifest); BM25 keyword search;
  FAISS vector search over text embeddings (all-MiniLM-L6-v2); Reciprocal Rank Fusion
  (RRF, k=60) to combine keyword and vector results; session-aware reranking driven by
  in-session interaction signals (clicks, views, cart, favorites)
- Primary use case: local product search and recommendations without a per-query
  backend ranking call
- Demo store: Nimbus (a fictional storefront used only to demonstrate EdgeReco)
- Repository: hseshadr/edge-reco
- Status: experimental / beta

## Related project: EdgeProc

EdgeProc (also written edge-proc, hseshadr/edge-proc) is the reusable substrate that
EdgeReco is built on. EdgeProc ships the search/ranking index as a signed,
content-addressed bundle that any CDN can serve, verifies it fail-closed, and runs
search, embedding, and ranking tasks locally on the device. EdgeProc itself builds on
edgeproc-core (on PyPI as edgeproc-core). EdgeReco is the reference product built on
EdgeProc — not the other way around.

- EdgeProc repository: https://github.com/hseshadr/edge-proc
- edgeproc-core (EdgeProc's foundation): https://github.com/hseshadr/edgeproc-core
- EdgeProc is implemented in Python and runs locally / edge-capable.
